feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: DOJ legally backs death penalty, says ‘our moral views not relevant’

link.title: DOJ legally backs death penalty, says ‘our moral views not relevant’

entry.content: Cagayan de Oro 2nd District Representative Rufus Rodriguez interpellates Justice Assistant Secretary Nicholas Felix Ty on international law – how to reconcile a reimposition of the death penalty when the Philippines was a state party to the 2nd protocol of the International Covenant on Civil and Political Rights (ICCPR) that explicitly bans execution. Full story:
entry.summary: Cagayan de Oro 2nd District Representative Rufus Rodriguez interpellates Justice Assistant Secretary Nicholas Felix Ty on international law – how to reconcile a reimposition of the death penalty when the Philippines was a state party to the 2nd protocol of the International Covenant on Civil and Political Rights (ICCPR) that explicitly bans execution. Full story:

entry.title: Kid Collides With Guy While Skateboarding

link.title: Kid Collides With Guy While Skateboarding

entry.content: This kid was about to slide down a slope on his skateboard at a skatepark. However, when he glided, a guy came towards him on his skateboard. They both accidentally crashed into each other and fell.
entry.summary: This kid was about to slide down a slope on his skateboard at a skatepark. However, when he glided, a guy came towards him on his skateboard. They both accidentally crashed into each other and fell.

entry.title: El coronavirus deja fuera de juego a Iñaki Urdangarin

link.title: El coronavirus deja fuera de juego a Iñaki Urdangarin

entry.content: El marido de la infanta Cristina ha tenido que interrumpir de nuevo sus labores de voluntariado en el Hogar Don Orione por un foco de contagios
entry.summary: El marido de la infanta Cristina ha tenido que interrumpir de nuevo sus labores de voluntariado en el Hogar Don Orione por un foco de contagios

entry.title: Aisne : quatre enfants meurent dans un accident de la route à Laon

link.title: Aisne : quatre enfants meurent dans un accident de la route à Laon

entry.content: Après le terrible accident qui a coûté la vie à cinq enfants d’une même famille sur l’A7 à hauteur d’Albon dans la Drôme, un nouveau drame s’est produit sur la RN2 au niveau de Laon (Aisne). Quatre enfants ont perdu la vie mardi dans un accident de la route impliquant cinq véhicules.
entry.summary: Après le terrible accident qui a coûté la vie à cinq enfants d’une même famille sur l’A7 à hauteur d’Albon dans la Drôme, un nouveau drame s’est produit sur la RN2 au niveau de Laon (Aisne). Quatre enfants ont perdu la vie mardi dans un accident de la route impliquant cinq véhicules.

entry.title: Ram Mandir Bhumi Pujan: Ayodhya में तैयारी पूरी, CM Yogi ने तैयारियों का लिया जायजा वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Ram Mandir Bhumi Pujan: Ayodhya में तैयारी पूरी, CM Yogi ने तैयारियों का लिया जायजा वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Preparations have been made for Bhoomipujan of Ram Janmabhoomi temple in Ayodhya. This time the Bhoomi Poojan ceremony of Ram temple will be grand as well as special attention is also being given to other aspects related to this program. Only two days are left in the Bhoomi Poojan of Ram temple. CM Yogi Adityanath reached Ayodhya on Monday to take stock of the preparations for Bhoomi Pujan. The Ayodhya Mahotsav is preparing to decorate 51 hundred urns for the Trust, for which the painter has painted in Ayodhya Saraswati Vidya Mandir to give shape to the Kalash.
अयोध्या में राम जन्मभूमि मंदिर के भूमिपूजन की तैयारी हो चुकी है. इस बार राम मंदिर का भूमि पूजन समारोह तो भव्य होगा ही साथ ही इस कार्यक्रम से जुडे़ अन्य पहलूओं पर भी खास ध्यान दिया जा रहा है. राम मंदिर के भूमि पूजन में मात्र दो दिन बचे हैं. सीएम योगी आदित्यनाथ सोमवार को भूमि पूजन की तैयारियों का जायजा लेने अयोध्या पहुंचे. अयोध्या महोत्सव न्यास की तरफ से 51 सौ कलश सजाने की तैयारी है, जिसके लिए अयोध्या के सरस्वती विद्या मंदिर में चित्रकार कलशों को स्वरूप देने के लिए चित्रकारी की है.
#RamMandirBhumiPujan #CMYogiAyodhya #oneindiahindi
entry.summary: Preparations have been made for Bhoomipujan of Ram Janmabhoomi temple in Ayodhya. This time the Bhoomi Poojan ceremony of Ram temple will be grand as well as special attention is also being given to other aspects related to this program. Only two days are left in the Bhoomi Poojan of Ram temple. CM Yogi Adityanath reached Ayodhya on Monday to take stock of the preparations for Bhoomi Pujan. The Ayodhya Mahotsav is preparing to decorate 51 hundred urns for the Trust, for which the painter has painted in Ayodhya Saraswati Vidya Mandir to give shape to the Kalash. अयोध्या में राम जन्मभूमि मंदिर के भूमिपूजन की तैयारी हो चुकी है. इस बार राम मंदिर का भूमि पूजन समारोह तो भव्य होगा ही साथ ही इस कार्यक्रम से जुडे़ अन्य पहलूओं पर भी खास ध्यान दिया जा रहा है. राम मंदिर के भूमि पूजन में मात्र दो दिन बचे हैं. सीएम योगी आदित्यनाथ सोमवार को भूमि पूजन की तैयारियों का जायजा लेने अयोध्या पहुंचे. अयोध्या महोत्सव न्यास की तरफ से 51 सौ कलश सजाने की तैयारी है, जिसके लिए अयोध्या के सरस्वती विद्या मंदिर में चित्रकार कलशों को स्वरूप देने के लिए चित्रकारी की है. #RamMandirBhumiPujan #CMYogiAyodhya #oneindiahindi

entry.title: Joe Jonas & Sophie Turner Are Officially Parents, Megan Thee Stallion Opens Up About Shooting and More News Billboard News

link.title: Joe Jonas & Sophie Turner Are Officially Parents, Megan Thee Stallion Opens Up About Shooting and More News Billboard News

entry.content: Drake breaks a new record on the Billboard Hot 100, Joe Jonas and Sophie Turner welcome their new baby and Megan Thee Stallion opens up on Instagram Live about her gunshot wounds.
entry.summary: Drake breaks a new record on the Billboard Hot 100, Joe Jonas and Sophie Turner welcome their new baby and Megan Thee Stallion opens up on Instagram Live about her gunshot wounds.

entry.title: Bhoomi Pujan: ‘There is wave of satisfaction across country’, says Mohan Bhagwat

link.title: Bhoomi Pujan: ‘There is wave of satisfaction across country’, says Mohan Bhagwat

entry.content: Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh Chief Mohan Bhagwat on the occasion of Bhoomi Pujan remembered the people who could not make it to the ceremony. Mohan Bhagwat said, “So many people had sacrificed, they couldn’t be here physically. There are some who couldn’t come here, Advani ji must be at his home watching this. There are some who should’ve come but couldn’t be invited because of the situation.” “Poore desh mein aaj anand ki lehar hai. Sadiyon ki aas poore hone ka anand hai. Sabse bada anand hai Bharat ko atmanirbhar banane ke liye jis atma vishwas ki awashikta thi uska sagun-saakaar adhishthan aaj ho raha hai,” he added.
entry.summary: Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh Chief Mohan Bhagwat on the occasion of Bhoomi Pujan remembered the people who could not make it to the ceremony. Mohan Bhagwat said, “So many people had sacrificed, they couldn’t be here physically. There are some who couldn’t come here, Advani ji must be at his home watching this. There are some who should’ve come but couldn’t be invited because of the situation.” “Poore desh mein aaj anand ki lehar hai. Sadiyon ki aas poore hone ka anand hai. Sabse bada anand hai Bharat ko atmanirbhar banane ke liye jis atma vishwas ki awashikta thi uska sagun-saakaar adhishthan aaj ho raha hai,” he added.

entry.title: India China Tension: Pangong-Godhra में पीछे नहीं हटी Chinese Troops वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: India China Tension: Pangong-Godhra में पीछे नहीं हटी Chinese Troops वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
India China Tension: Chinese army not back in Pangong-Gogra, no change in finger area. Tension between the border between India and China is not being named. Although there has been some drawback in this, but the Chinese army is not ready to retreat. The Chinese army has still not left behind in Pangong and Gogra areas.
भारत और चीन के बीच सीमा पर तनाव कम होने का नाम नहीं ले रहा है. हालांकि इसमे थोड़ी कमी जरूर आई है, लेकिन चीनी सेना पीछे हटने को तैयार नहीं है. पैंगॉन्ग और गोगरा इलाके में अभी भी चीनी सेना पीछे नहीं गई है.
#IndiaChinaTension #Pangong #Gogra
entry.summary: India China Tension: Chinese army not back in Pangong-Gogra, no change in finger area. Tension between the border between India and China is not being named. Although there has been some drawback in this, but the Chinese army is not ready to retreat. The Chinese army has still not left behind in Pangong and Gogra areas. भारत और चीन के बीच सीमा पर तनाव कम होने का नाम नहीं ले रहा है. हालांकि इसमे थोड़ी कमी जरूर आई है, लेकिन चीनी सेना पीछे हटने को तैयार नहीं है. पैंगॉन्ग और गोगरा इलाके में अभी भी चीनी सेना पीछे नहीं गई है. #IndiaChinaTension #Pangong #Gogra

entry.title: Ali Türkoğlu - Virane

link.title: Ali Türkoğlu - Virane

entry.content:
Ali Türkoğlu - Virane (Müzik)
Temmuzun Sonunda Klibimiz yayında olacaktır.
Söz: Ali Türkoğlu
Müzik: Ali Türkoğlu
Düzenleme: Ali Türkoğlu
Yönetmen : Furkan Erbey
Görüntü Yönetmeni : Atakan Rebel
Yapım : Apak Music
Şarkı Sözleri:
VİRANE
Hayallerden kaçtım geldim yanına
Bulutlardan düştüm geldim kapına
Nasıl bir sevda bu yanına kalan
Vurdum dibe kendimi yan o zaman
Yanlışlar var tamam gönlünde bir yalan
Umutlarım vardı elimde kalan
Nasıl bu sevda çölü yangınlardan
Kurtar beni tanrım yalanlardan
Ata ata hep içime içime
Sabrımın taştığı yerdeyim artık
Hep bir ümitle düşüne düşüne
Tükenip bittim virane aşkın
#ali #alitürkoğlu #virane #alitürkoğluvirane
Diğer Ali Türkoğlu’nun klipleri: Siyah beyaz Donunay - Yavaş yavaş - Şerın ston
Siyah Beyaz feat. Chetto - Dolunay ►
Siyah - Beyaz - Şerın Sıton (Official Video) ►
Siyah Beyaz - Yavaş Yavaş ►
Apak Reklam Mimarlık A.Ş. – Apak Advertising Architecture Inc.
ABONE olmak için ►
Oynatma Listesi videoları:
Apak Advertising ►
Signs ►
Araç Giydirme ►
Fuar stand ►
Sosyal Hesaplarımız:
Facebook ►
Twitter ►
Instagram ►
Pinterest ►
Tumblr ►
Vk ►
Web Site ►
Video konu etiketleri :#ali #turkolgu #virane #apak #median
entry.summary: Ali Türkoğlu - Virane (Müzik) Temmuzun Sonunda Klibimiz yayında olacaktır. Söz: Ali Türkoğlu Müzik: Ali Türkoğlu Düzenleme: Ali Türkoğlu Yönetmen : Furkan Erbey Görüntü Yönetmeni : Atakan Rebel Yapım : Apak Music Şarkı Sözleri: VİRANE Hayallerden kaçtım geldim yanına Bulutlardan düştüm geldim kapına Nasıl bir sevda bu yanına kalan Vurdum dibe kendimi yan o zaman Yanlışlar var tamam gönlünde bir yalan Umutlarım vardı elimde kalan Nasıl bu sevda çölü yangınlardan Kurtar beni tanrım yalanlardan Ata ata hep içime içime Sabrımın taştığı yerdeyim artık Hep bir ümitle düşüne düşüne Tükenip bittim virane aşkın #ali #alitürkoğlu #virane #alitürkoğluvirane Diğer Ali Türkoğlu’nun klipleri: Siyah beyaz Donunay - Yavaş yavaş - Şerın ston Siyah Beyaz feat. Chetto - Dolunay ► Siyah - Beyaz - Şerın Sıton (Official Video) ► Siyah Beyaz - Yavaş Yavaş ► Apak Reklam Mimarlık A.Ş. – Apak Advertising Architecture Inc. entry.title: Ram temple is the victory of the devotees of Hindu society: Vinay Kati

link.title: Ram temple is the victory of the devotees of Hindu society: Vinay Kati

entry.content:
Ram temple construction is a victory for the devotees of Hindu society because truth always triumphs. The foundation of new history will be laid and this foundation will be such that it will indicate that we have to go towards Mathura and Kashi.
#VinayKatiyar #Ayodhya #RamTemple
entry.summary: Ram temple construction is a victory for the devotees of Hindu society because truth always triumphs. The foundation of new history will be laid and this foundation will be such that it will indicate that we have to go towards Mathura and Kashi. #VinayKatiyar #Ayodhya #RamTemple

entry.title: Ayodhya Ram Mandir: आज PM Modi करेंगे Bhumi Pujan, जानिए शुभमुहूर्त वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Ayodhya Ram Mandir: आज PM Modi करेंगे Bhumi Pujan, जानिए शुभमुहूर्त वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Today the Bhoomi Poojan program has been organized before the construction of the temple in Ayodhya, the birthplace of Lord Rama. In which Prime Minister Narendra Modi will also lay the foundation stone of the temple and the construction work of the temple will be launched. According to the information, PM Modi will spend a total of 3 hours in Ayodhya for this event.Watch video,
भगवान राम की जन्मभूमि अयोध्या में मंदिर निर्माण का शुभारंभ किए जाने से पहले आज भूमि पूजन कार्यक्रम का आयोजन किया गया है. जिसमें प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी मंदिर की आधारशिला भी रखेंगे और मंदिर के निर्माण कार्य का शुभारंभ किया जाएगा. इस कार्यक्रम के लिए कई दिन पहले से अयोध्या को सजाने का कार्य शुरू कर दिया गया था.जानकारी के मुताबिक, प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी इस कार्यक्रम के लिए कुल 3 घंटे अयोध्या में रहेंगे. देखें वीडियो
#Ayodhya #RamMandir #PMModi
entry.summary: Today the Bhoomi Poojan program has been organized before the construction of the temple in Ayodhya, the birthplace of Lord Rama. In which Prime Minister Narendra Modi will also lay the foundation stone of the temple and the construction work of the temple will be launched. According to the information, PM Modi will spend a total of 3 hours in Ayodhya for this event.Watch video, भगवान राम की जन्मभूमि अयोध्या में मंदिर निर्माण का शुभारंभ किए जाने से पहले आज भूमि पूजन कार्यक्रम का आयोजन किया गया है. जिसमें प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी मंदिर की आधारशिला भी रखेंगे और मंदिर के निर्माण कार्य का शुभारंभ किया जाएगा. इस कार्यक्रम के लिए कई दिन पहले से अयोध्या को सजाने का कार्य शुरू कर दिया गया था.जानकारी के मुताबिक, प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी इस कार्यक्रम के लिए कुल 3 घंटे अयोध्या में रहेंगे. देखें वीडियो #Ayodhya #RamMandir #PMModi

entry.title: Kenya’s virus cases hit 23,202 as 605 new infections recorded

link.title: Kenya’s virus cases hit 23,202 as 605 new infections recorded

entry.content: Kenya on Tuesday recorded 605 new cases of Covid-19, raising the country’s total to 23,202, 587 patients have recovered from the disease and 6 more patients succumbed to the virus, raising fatalities in the country to 388.
entry.summary: Kenya on Tuesday recorded 605 new cases of Covid-19, raising the country’s total to 23,202, 587 patients have recovered from the disease and 6 more patients succumbed to the virus, raising fatalities in the country to 388.

entry.title: 2021 Hyundai Sonata Hybrid Driving Video

link.title: 2021 Hyundai Sonata Hybrid Driving Video

entry.content:
Following a complete redesign in 2020, the 2021 Sonata model line features available 19-inch wheels and tires, Safe Exit Warning and a 6-way power passenger seat on the Limited trim. The 2021 Sonata goes on sale in August.
The 19-inch alloy wheels with 245/40 R19 Pirelli P Zero™ tires are now standard on the turbocharged SEL Plus trim. P-Zero All Season tires are for driving enthusiasts who want a combination of a performance appearance, responsive handling and durability along with all-season traction, including in light snow.
Safe Exit Warning (SEW) has been added to SEL, SEL Plus and Limited trims. SEW uses existing blind-spot radar sensors to automatically warn the driver and passengers if oncoming traffic is detected when parallel parked. The system provides an audible warning and a pop up message in the cluster to ‘Watch for Traffic’ to help to prevent back-seat passengers from stepping out into traffic.
entry.summary: Following a complete redesign in 2020, the 2021 Sonata model line features available 19-inch wheels and tires, Safe Exit Warning and a 6-way power passenger seat on the Limited trim. The 2021 Sonata goes on sale in August. The 19-inch alloy wheels with 245/40 R19 Pirelli P Zero™ tires are now standard on the turbocharged SEL Plus trim. P-Zero All Season tires are for driving enthusiasts who want a combination of a performance appearance, responsive handling and durability along with all-season traction, including in light snow. Safe Exit Warning (SEW) has been added to SEL, SEL Plus and Limited trims. SEW uses existing blind-spot radar sensors to automatically warn the driver and passengers if oncoming traffic is detected when parallel parked. The system provides an audible warning and a pop up message in the cluster to ‘Watch for Traffic’ to help to prevent back-seat passengers from stepping out into traffic.

entry.title: Quimbo: Over-projections give PhilHealth ‘more leeway’ to commit fraud

link.title: Quimbo: Over-projections give PhilHealth ‘more leeway’ to commit fraud

entry.content: Economist turned lawmaker Stella Quimbo doubts the Philippine Health Insurance Corporation (PhilHealth) is in danger of bankruptcy, accusing the agency of exaggerating figures as it faces yet another corruption scandal. Full story:
entry.summary: Economist turned lawmaker Stella Quimbo doubts the Philippine Health Insurance Corporation (PhilHealth) is in danger of bankruptcy, accusing the agency of exaggerating figures as it faces yet another corruption scandal. Full story:

entry.title: Halo Infinite - Official Reverie Soundtrack (2020)

link.title: Halo Infinite - Official Reverie Soundtrack (2020)

entry.content:
Humanity’s fate hangs in the balance as the Master Chief returns in Halo Infinite to confront the most ruthless foe he’s ever faced – the Banished. This song, "Reverie," is composed by Curtis Schweitzer and was featured in the Campaign demo. Subscribe #XboxViewTV ➤
Visit to read more about Curtis’ approach to respecting the legacy while introducing new and unexpected ideas into Halo’s musical tapestry.
—

This song, "Reverie," is composed by Curtis Schweitzer and was featured in the Campaign demo. entry.title: The terrible fate of Bosnian refugees in Bosnia and Herzegovina

link.title: The terrible fate of Bosnian refugees in Bosnia and Herzegovina

entry.content: The photographer Jost Franko went to meet the Bosnian men and women who, twenty-five years after the Srebrenica massacre, are surviving in refugee camps, far from everything.
entry.summary: The photographer Jost Franko went to meet the Bosnian men and women who, twenty-five years after the Srebrenica massacre, are surviving in refugee camps, far from everything.

entry.title: Former PhilHealth official: Execs stole, misspent P15 billion Evening wRap

link.title: Former PhilHealth official: Execs stole, misspent P15 billion Evening wRap

entry.content:
Today on Rappler – the latest news in the Philippines and around the world:
- PhilHealth execs misspent, stole P15 billion, says resigned anti-fraud official
- Joy Belmonte gives ‘shoot-to-kill’ QC official second chance: ‘He apologized to me’
- ‘Protest but make it cute’: Top PH trend is a hashtag with turtle emoji
- It’s been a Jumanji year so far: Loose ostrich in QC trends online
- FALSE: Noynoy Aquino incurred P6.4-trillion debt, higher than Duterte
entry.summary: Today on Rappler – the latest news in the Philippines and around the world: - PhilHealth execs misspent, stole P15 billion, says resigned anti-fraud official - Joy Belmonte gives ‘shoot-to-kill’ QC official second chance: ‘He apologized to me’ - ‘Protest but make it cute’: Top PH trend is a hashtag with turtle emoji - It’s been a Jumanji year so far: Loose ostrich in QC trends online - FALSE: Noynoy Aquino incurred P6.4-trillion debt, higher than Duterte

entry.title: AIMIM Asaduddin Owaisi slams Priyanka Gandhi

link.title: AIMIM Asaduddin Owaisi slams Priyanka Gandhi

entry.content: With less than 24 hours to go for the grand Bhumi Pujan, the temple town of Ayodhya is bracing itself for the grandest celebration ever. AIMIM chief Asaduddin Owaisi slams Congress General Secretary Priyanka Gandhi Vadra over statement on Bhumi Pujan. Owaisi said Congress has always done Hindutva politics silently from starting. Watch the video to know more.
entry.summary: With less than 24 hours to go for the grand Bhumi Pujan, the temple town of Ayodhya is bracing itself for the grandest celebration ever. AIMIM chief Asaduddin Owaisi slams Congress General Secretary Priyanka Gandhi Vadra over statement on Bhumi Pujan. Owaisi said Congress has always done Hindutva politics silently from starting. Watch the video to know more.
